title: Hungry Cows
description: Cows/Mooshrooms now eat Grass/Mycelium/plants to restore their Milkability/Health, Milk functions as food and many more related features.
body:
![Grazing Cow on the left and Grazing Mooshroom on the right of Hungry Cows Title](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/7jh5r.gif)

## Cows are **NOT** infinite milk machines! In Minecraft, Cows can give **endless** amounts of Milk,
and drinking it does **nothing** for your hunger. That, frankly, makes **no** sense!
### *_Cows are hungry and milk fills you up!_*
## Features: || **Feature** | `Cow` | `Mooshroom` | `Goat` | `Sheep` | ⚙️ _Configurable?_ | |:-:|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|:------:|:-----------:|:------:|:------------:|:----------------------------------------| |    ![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/22e9z.png) | **Eating Grass and some Plant Blocks restores _Milkability_
and health** | ✅ | ✅
(Eats Mycelium) | ❌
(Can only be fed) | ✅
(for Wool) | ✅ (Probability, Baby Growth, Healing, Plant Blocks via tags) | |![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/si2ie.png)| **Milk restores Hunger & Saturation
+ stacks up to 16** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | ✅ (Nutritional values per milk type) | |![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/cdjvb.png)| **Can be fed to regain _Milkability_
+ to restore 1 ❤
(Note: Feeding has a 5 min cooldown by default.)** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅
(for Wool) | ✅ (Feedable items per animal, cooldown) | |![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/b7fbw.png)| **Dispensers can milk** | ✅ | ✅
(+ with Bowls) | ✅ | | ❌ | |![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/ct6s4.png)| **Show _Milkability_ through Model & Texture** | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | | ✅ | |![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/gshzk.png)| **Jade shows _Milkability_ and _Feedability_ status** | ✅ | ✅
(+ Flower for Suspicious Stew) | ✅ | ✅
(Feedability) | ✅ (Jade not required, toggleable each) | ## Compatibility: Fully compatible with [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin/). Fully compatible with [Fresh Animations 1.10.4](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations/version/1.10.4). Extensive [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade/) integration. If you encounter any incompatibilities, bugs or other issues — please report them on [GitHub](https://github.com/pnk2u/hungrycows/issues). ## Special Thanks: [Nemo](https://modrinth.com/user/NemoNotFound) | [Qu](https://modrinth.com/user/Quplet) | [Serilum](https://modrinth.com/user/Serilum)
